prompt:
Given the following financial snapshot, generate 1-3 actionable insights. Use UGX for amounts. Be concise. Respond with a JSON array of objects, each with "type" (positive|warning|info), "message", and "action".

Financial snapshot:
Latest month: Jan 2025
  Income: 2,500,000 UGX
  Expenses: 2,800,000 UGX
  Savings rate: -12.0%
  Top categories: Rent (1,200,000), Food (450,000), Transport (300,000)

Previous month: Dec 2024
  Income: 2,400,000 UGX
  Expenses: 2,100,000 UGX

Historical category averages (per month):
  Rent: 1,100,000, Food: 400,000, Transport: 280,000
response: [{"type": "warning", "message": "You spent 12% more than you earned this month. Consider cutting non-essential expenses or using savings to cover the gap.", "action": "Review spending"}, {"type": "warning", "message": "Rent is 9% above your average. Check if any one-off costs inflated this month.", "action": "Review 'Rent' pod"}]

prompt:
